---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for OpenPaper AI
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement, discussion
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve.
Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]" or "Users need the ability to [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Package Type (if applicable)

- [ ] Agent
- [ ] Workflow
- [ ] Tool
- [ ] Provider
- [ ] Infrastructure / Platform
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Impact

Describe who would benefit from this feature and how:

- **Target users:** [e.g., developers, operators, end users]
- **Use case:** [e.g., "Data analysts need to export workflow results to CSV"]
- **Frequency:** [e.g., daily task, one-time setup]

## Implementation Ideas (optional)

If you have suggestions for how to implement this, include them here:

```python
# Pseudo-code or API design sketch
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here.

## Would you be willing to contribute this feature?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting the idea
